title: picris hieracioides
intro: Picris hieracioides, also known as Hawkweed oxtongue, is a biennial or perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Picris hieracioides include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be dried and powdered for use in capsules or tablets.
